question: What is average order value by region for completed orders?
sql: SELECT region, SUM(gross_sales_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(order_id), 0) AS average_order_value FROM DEMO.ANALYTICS.ORDERS WHERE status = %s GROUP BY region ORDER BY average_order_value DESC LIMIT 11

metric.name: average_order_value
metric.description: Ad hoc gross sales divided by order count.
assumptions: Each non-null order ID represents one order.

interpretation.formula: Gross sales divided by order count
